    S

    saveToFile() - Method in class TvShowManager
    Method Name: saveToFile Purpose: Writes all current TV show records from the arrayList collection to the tvShows.txt file.
    setAnimated(int) - Method in class TvShow
    sets the animated value of the tv show if the user enters an integer
    setAnimatedGui(boolean) - Method in class TvShow
    sets the value of the boolean type representing the animation status of the tv show
    setCompletionDate(int) - Method in class TvShow
    takes in the input from the user and wht they would like ot set the date associated with the tv show.
    setCompletionMonth(int) - Method in class TvShow
    sets the month associated with thee tv show as entered by the user.
    setCompletionYear(int) - Method in class TvShow
    the functio for the user to set the year associated with the tv show
    setId() - Method in class TvShowManager
    Method Name: setId Purpose: Generates and returns the next available unique ID that is not currently assigned to any existing TV show record.
    setOnWatchList(int) - Method in class TvShow
    sets the value of the watchlist and enforces the validation of the input.
    setOnWatchListGui(boolean) - Method in class TvShow
     
    setRating(double) - Method in class TvShow
    function to set the rating associated with the tv show and enforces the boundary of the rating.
    setTitle(String) - Method in class TvShow
     
    setUrl(String) - Method in class TvShowManager
